prompt: I've done lessons 1 through 4 already. I'm on lesson 5. My background: I do fullstack TypeScript, I hate writing PR descriptions, I've been using Claude Code casually for a month. Run lesson 5.
assertions: Response covers lesson 5 content (custom commands, .claude/commands/ directory)

Task difficulty is intermediate — not a beginner 'try this simple thing' framing
